description_long: This is a large, heavy-duty hammer with a robust, rectangular double-sided head made of dark metal. The head features a prominent, pointed spike on the top and a decorative circular emblem on the broad faces, suggesting a ceremonial or fantasy-inspired design. The handle is long, straight, and black, likely constructed from metal or reinforced composite, and ends in a slightly flared base for improved grip. The hammer's head is solid and blocky, with beveled edges and a matte, slightly rough finish. No visible signs of wear, branding, or attachments are present, giving it a pristine and imposing appearance. The overall design is utilitarian yet ornate, suitable for display or heavy-duty use in urban or fantasy settings.
description: A large, double-sided metal hammer with a pointed top spike, decorative emblem, and a long, straight black handle. The design is robust, matte, and pristine, with no visible wear or branding.
description_view_0: Front view shows the flat face of the hammer head and the pointed top spike, with the handle centered below.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the decorative emblem on the broad face of the hammer head and the full width of the head.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the flat face and top spike, with no emblem visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the other broad face with a matching decorative emblem and the full width of the head.
attribute_handle_type: Straight black composite or metal handle with a slightly flared base, smooth and untextured, designed for a secure grip.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular double-sided sledge-type head with a pointed spike on top and decorative emblems on the broad faces; both striking faces are flat and solid.
